summary: readNamesFile reads all input into a single []byte before JSON vs plain-text branching.
reason: Previous implementation opened the source twice; for path=='-' the second open returned the same os.Stdin fd after the first json.Decoder had buffered ~512 bytes internally, silently truncating plain-text input piped via `check --file -`.
validated_outcome: Smoke-tested JSON array and plain-text (with # comments) stdin shapes via `check --file - --dry-run`; both round-trip cleanly.
